schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department for the Deaf and Hard-Of-Hearing

series_metadata.series_description: Documents the receipt of requests for the services of an interpreter and the Department's responses.

retention_rules.disposition_method: Transfer To The State Records Center,Library Of Virginia

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department for the Deaf and Hard-Of-Hearing

series_metadata.series_description: Documents the receipt of and responses to requests for assistive technology (text telephones, amplified telephones and ring signalers). Includes data required to calculate sliding fees based on \applicant income.

retention_rules.disposition_method: Transfer To The State Records Center, Library Of Virginia

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department for the Deaf and Hard-Of-Hearing

series_metadata.series_description: Documents the screening of candidates to serve as interpreters for the deaf and hard of hearing. Candidates are rated by the levels of their abilities.

retention_rules.disposition_method: Transfer To The State Records Center, Library Of Virginia
